zh.Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾
zh.Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可巴根斯索普

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Moleyns於1353年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，他的父親William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns23歲，母親Margery Bacon17歲。他於1377年與Eleanor de Beaumont在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1384年12月14日在他的家鄉享年31歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Moleyns于1353年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾时，他的父亲William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns23岁，母亲Margery Bacon17岁。他于1377年与Eleanor de Beaumont在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1384年12月14日在他的家乡享年31岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Moleyns was born in 1353, in Buckinghamshire, England, his father, William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns, was 23 and his mother, Margery Bacon, was 17. He married Eleanor de Beaumont in 1377, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 14 December 1384, in his hometown, at the age of 31, and was buried in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Moleyns est né en 1353, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margery Bacon, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Beaumont en 1377, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 décembre 1384, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Moleyns 1353 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns 23 und seine Mutter Margery Bacon 17. Er hat 1377 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Eleanor de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. Dezember 1384 im Alter von 31 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Moleyns è nato il nel 1353 nel Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margery Bacon, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Beaumont nel 1377, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 14 dicembre 1384, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Moleynsが1353年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Moleyns Lord Moleynsは23歳，母Margery Baconは17歳であった。1377年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでEleanor de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1384年12月14日に故郷で31歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアストク ポジェズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Moleyns(이)가 1353년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Bacon(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1377년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Eleanor de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1384년 12월 14일 그의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 스토크 포그스에 묻혔다.

mn.Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: Arundel, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Moleyns nasceu em 1353, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margery Bacon, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Beaumont em 1377, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1384, em sua cidade natal, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Moleyns родился в 1353 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Bacon, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Beaumont в 1377 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 декабря 1384 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности сток погесь, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Moleyns nació en 1353, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margery Bacon, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Beaumont en 1377, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de diciembre de 1384, en su pueblo, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
